title: gladiolus bullatus
intro: Gladiolus bullatus, also known as the Spotted Corn Lily or Leopard Lily, is a species of flowering plant in the Iridaceae family. It is primarily used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as treating skin conditions, wounds, and respiratory issues, as well as possessing antioxidant properties. In herbal preparations, Gladiolus bullatus is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat a range of ailments, including fever, cough, and sore throats.
